description: Phase 36: Premium Differentiators - Create packages for local-first mode, E2E encryption (default), user-owned AI (BYOM), cross-app workflows, AI auto-organization, voice-first input, co-presence rooms, and universal capture bar (Quant Notes).
steps: Create packages/local-first/package.json with standard @quant/local-first config (type module, vitest, typescript ~5.5.0)
Create packages/local-first/src/types.ts with: LocalFirstConfig, SyncState, ConflictResolution, OfflineQueue, ReplicationLog interfaces
Create packages/local-first/src/offline-store.ts with: OfflineStore class (IndexedDB-based local storage, CRDT conflict resolution, automatic sync queue, full account offline-first capability)
Create packages/local-first/src/sync-manager.ts with: SyncManager class (background sync when online, conflict detection/resolution, version vectors, merge strategies)
Create packages/encryption/src/types.ts with: E2EEConfig, KeyPair, EncryptedPayload, KeyRotationPolicy, DeviceKey interfaces
Create packages/encryption/src/e2ee.ts with: E2EEManager class (default-on encryption, key generation, key rotation, device key management, encrypted-at-rest, zero-knowledge architecture)
Create packages/encryption/src/key-exchange.ts with: KeyExchange class (X3DH protocol, pre-key bundles, session establishment)
Create packages/user-owned-ai/src/types.ts with: BYOMConfig, ModelProvider, ModelEndpoint, InferenceRequest, ModelCapabilities interfaces

Create packages/user-owned-ai/src/byom-engine.ts with: BYOMEngine class (bring-your-own-model, custom endpoint configuration, model capability detection, local inference option, cost tracking per user model)
Create packages/cross-app-workflows/src/types.ts with: Workflow, WorkflowStep, WorkflowTrigger, WorkflowAction, CrossAppContext interfaces

Create packages/cross-app-workflows/src/workflow-engine.ts with: WorkflowEngine class (first-class workflow objects, cross-app triggers/actions, conditional branching, error handling, execution history)
Create packages/voice-input/src/types.ts with: VoiceConfig, TranscriptionResult, VoiceCommand, VoiceSession interfaces
Create packages/voice-input/src/voice-engine.ts with: VoiceEngine class (voice as first-class input, real-time transcription, voice commands, multi-language, noise cancellation config)
Create packages/ai-organization/src/types.ts with: AutoOrgConfig, OrgRule, FileClassification, SmartFolder, TagSuggestion interfaces
Create packages/ai-organization/src/auto-organizer.ts with: AutoOrganizer class (AI-driven file/message/doc organization, smart folders, auto-tagging, priority sorting, pattern learning)
Create packages/co-presence/src/types.ts with: CoPresenceRoom, Participant, CursorPosition, AwarenessState interfaces
Create packages/co-presence/src/presence-room.ts with: PresenceRoom class (real-time co-presence, cursor sharing, awareness indicators, room lifecycle)
Create packages/universal-capture/src/types.ts with: CaptureItem, CaptureSource, CaptureBar, QuickNote interfaces

Create packages/universal-capture/src/capture-bar.ts with: UniversalCaptureBar class (Quant Notes - system-wide capture bar, quick notes from anywhere, auto-route to correct app, rich capture with links/images/voice)
acceptance_criteria: Voice input works as first-class input method
pnpm build succeeds for all new packages
findings: All 8 packages created and verified. 133 tests pass across 10 test files (25 local-first, 26 encryption, 13 user-owned-ai, 13 cross-app-workflows, 15 voice-input, 12 ai-organization, 13 co-presence, 16 universal-capture). Typecheck and build succeed. Prettier pre-commit hook reformats files automatically. noUnusedLocals strict mode required removing unused imports from test files.
